message:
fix: validate dog name in Remove/Add to prevent kennel deletion and path traversal

Remove('') would resolve dogDir to the kennel root itself, causing
os.RemoveAll to delete the entire kennel. Names with path separators
or ".." could escape the kennel directory. Added validateName() check
to both Remove and Add.

Fixes gt-6cft8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
